_convention._note: KEY NAMING RULES — read before adding keys:
_convention._1: Use camelCase for keys: commentSubmit not comment_submit
_convention._2: Group by page/feature namespace: nav, home, blog, about
_convention._3: Shared UI primitives go in 'common', NOT in feature namespaces
_convention._4: en.json is source of truth — zh.json must mirror structure exactly
_convention._5: Run 'npm run i18n:check' before committing to catch zombie keys

home.title: Jack Deng
home.bio: Software engineer building things at the intersection of {ai}, {data}, and {systems}.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Thoughts on engineering, systems, and building things.
blog.commentCount: {count, plural, =0 {No comments yet} one {# comment} other {# comments}}
blog.commentDisclaimer: Comments are reviewed before appearing. No spam, no selling your email.
blog.commentSubmitSuccessNote: It will appear after review. Thanks for reading.

about.title: Jack Deng
about.subtitle: Software Engineer · Builder · Writer
about.bio1: Hi, I'm Jack — a software engineer based in Australia who loves building things end-to-end. I'm particularly drawn to the intersection of great developer experience and delightful user interfaces.
about.bio2: This site is my public workspace: a place for writing, experiments, and tools I build for fun or productivity. It runs on {nextjs} + {payload} with a PostgreSQL backend, self-hosted on {supabase}.
about.bio3: When I'm not at a keyboard I'm probably reading, hiking, or figuring out why the coffee tastes different today.
about.ctaText: Interested in working together or just want to say hi?

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.message: Sorry, we couldn't find the page you're looking for.
